'''''The New Essential Guide to Droids''''' is the twelfth reference book in the [[Star Wars: Essential Guides|''Essential Guide'']] series of reference books by [[Del Rey]], and an updated edition of [[1999]]'s ''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''. Published on [[June 27]], [[2006]], ''The New Essential Guide to Droids'' was written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and illustrated by [[Ian Fullwood]]. At 224 pages, the guide covers 90 [[Droid/Legends|droids]] divided into the five classes of intelligence, as well as four [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]], a history of droids, a layperson's guide to droids, and an overview of major manufacturers.

==Continuity==
''The New Essential Guide to Droids'' is somewhat special in the sense that it answers one of the questions that have been discussed in the ''Star Wars'' fan community since the release of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''—namely, the question of the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile's]] canonical gender. In this book it is established that the Exile is a [[Gender/Legends|female]], and thus the book breaks with the tradition of making characters that originate as customizable characters in video game male.

Her gender was established in three different paragraphs quotations of which are listed below:
{{Quote|G0-T0 soon became mixed up with an exiled Jedi Knight and '''her''' mission to destroy the Sith Lords.|from the entry on the [[G0-T0]] droid, p. 25|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''The New Essential Guide to Droids'' </ref>}}
{{Quote|Five standard years later, T3-M4 appeared aboard the abandoned freighter ''Ebon Hawk'', where he fell into the company of the '''heroine''' known only as the Jedi Exile.|from the entry on the [[T3-series utility droid|T3 droid]], p. 37|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />}}
{{Quote|Five years after the Star Forge incident, HK-47 teamed up with the '''heroine''' known as the Jedi Exile to battle a trio of Sith Lords.|from the entry on the [[HK-series assassin droid|HK assassin droid]], p. 107|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />}}
